question: The line chart shows earnings from 2018 to 2020 (later years extend beyond the visible scale). Which of the following statements is supported by the chart?

options.B: Earnings more than tripled from 2019 to 2020.
options.D: Earnings increased every year from 2018 to 2020.

explanation: The scale is set so that the highest bars exceed the visible area, leading to a misleading impression of equality.
